cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "

[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h# Fix 2: Fix missing } in DeclarationSpecifiers handler
[?2004l[?2004h# Find the broken block
[?2004l[?2004himport re
[?2004l[?2004hcontent = content.replace('''        else
[?2004l[?2004h          ABORT();
[?2004l[?2004h      else
[?2004l[?2004h        ABORT();
[?2004l[?2004h    } else if (auto q = i->typeQualifier()) {''', '''        else
[?2004l[?2004h          ABORT();
[?2004l[?2004h      }
[?2004l[?2004h      else
[?2004l[?2004h        ABORT();
[?2004l[?2004h    } else if (auto q = i->typeQualifier()) {''', 1)
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h# Fix 3: Fix Initializer handler - missing auto ret
[?2004l[?2004hcontent = content.replace('    return self(p);\n = make<InitListExpr>();', '    return self(p);\n  auto ret = make<InitListExpr>();', 1)
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hopen('task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'w').write(content)
[?2004l[?2004hprint('Fixed')
